tools.name: new_game
tools.description: Start a new game with the given scenario and character.

params.name: character_class
params.description: Hero class: fighter, mage, priest, thief

tools.name: move
tools.description: Move the hero in a direction.

params.name: direction
params.description: Direction: north, south, east, west, up, down

tools.name: pick_up
tools.description: Pick up an item from the current room.

tools.name: drop
tools.description: Drop an item from inventory into the current room.

tools.name: unequip
tools.description: Unequip an item from an equipment slot.

params.name: slot
params.description: Equipment slot: weapon, armor, ring, amulet

tools.name: examine
tools.description: Examine an item in inventory, equipped, or in the room.

tools.name: inventory
tools.description: List the hero's inventory and equipment.

tools.name: defend
tools.description: Raise guard to halve incoming damage for one round.

tools.name: flee
tools.description: Attempt to flee from combat (DEX check).

tools.name: cast_spell
tools.description: Cast a spell. Damage spells require combat; heal works anytime.

tools.name: save_game
tools.description: Save the current game state to a named slot.

tools.name: load_game
tools.description: Load a saved game state from a named slot.
